disclaimer.zh: 本模組呈現 Dogon 口傳宇宙觀（含 Marcel Griaule 系列紀錄）作為文化知識，不等同現代天文學或歷史定論；部分內容存在學術爭議。
disclaimer.en: This module presents Dogon oral cosmology (including lore documented in the Marcel Griaule corpus) as cultural knowledge, not as settled modern scientific fact; some claims remain academically contested.

cultural.zh: 可見主星，光耀如 Sigui 祭儀之火，統御多貢宇宙秩序。
cultural.en: Brilliant principal star; its heliacal rising marks the Sigui ceremonial fire and cosmic order.

cultural.zh: Po Tolo（白矮星）：比 fonio 種子重千倍的『種子星』，承載宇宙濃縮之力，50 年一圈，是生死轉化的計時者。
cultural.en: Po Tolo (white dwarf): the dense 'seed-star' heavier than fonio, tracing a 50-year ellipse — timekeeper of life–death transformation.

cultural.zh: Emme Ya Tolo（女性太陽）：Nommo 雙生神之一的象徵，連結月球週期與雙生性，此天體在天文學上尚未獲確認，以文化符號呈現。
cultural.en: Emme Ya Tolo ('Female Sun'): symbolic of one Nommo twin, linking lunar cycles and duality. Astronomically unconfirmed; presented as cultural symbol.

references: Griaule, Marcel & Dieterlen, Germaine (mid-20th c. ethnographic corpus)
van Beek, W. E. A. (critical reassessment of Dogon astronomical knowledge)
Temple, Robert – 'The Sirius Mystery' (popularized but contested interpretations)
Holberg, J.B. (2007) – Sirius: Brightest Diamond in the Night Sky
Modern astronomy: Sirius A/B orbital period ~50.09 years; Sirius B eccentricity ~0.59

sigui_life_phases.desc_zh: 宇宙蛋初破，生命原力潛藏，對應播種節律。
sigui_life_phases.desc_en: The cosmic egg cracks open; life force lies dormant, aligned with the planting rhythm.

sigui_life_phases.desc_zh: 水靈甦醒，雙生性顯現，社群連結建立。
sigui_life_phases.desc_en: Water-spirit stirs; duality awakens, communal bonds form.

sigui_life_phases.desc_zh: Po Tolo 軌道中段，個體承擔傳統責任，成為行走的祖先記憶。
sigui_life_phases.desc_en: Mid-orbit of Po Tolo; the individual bears traditional duties, becoming a living ancestral memory.

sigui_life_phases.desc_zh: Sigui 更新前夕，智慧濃縮如種子，準備播撒至下一代。
sigui_life_phases.desc_en: On the eve of Sigui renewal; wisdom condenses like seed, ready to scatter to the next generation.

sigui_life_phases.desc_zh: 宇宙週期閉合，Po Tolo 回到近點，長老智慧在大儀式中顯化傳承。
sigui_life_phases.desc_en: The cosmic cycle closes; Po Tolo returns to periapsis — elder wisdom manifests and is passed on in the Great Ceremony.

focus.zh: 索普德特（Sopdet）與天狼星歲首：每年偕日升預示尼羅河氾濫、農曆更新，是非洲最古老的天文曆法時標之一。
focus.en: Sopdet/Sirius heliacal rising: annual Nile-flood herald and calendar reset — one of Africa's oldest astronomical timekeepers.

focus.zh: 天狼星對應 Mrigashira 月宿邊緣，與 Vac（語言之神）及宇宙秩序（Ṛta）連結；固定星能量可作為出生盤判讀參考。
focus.en: Near Mrigashira nakshatra boundary; linked to Vac (speech deity) and Ṛta (cosmic order); fixed-star influence enriches natal reading.

focus.zh: 天狼星在紫微斗數中近似『天機』或『廉貞』之固定恆星能量，與週期運行之宮位形成跨文化共振，可探討命宮/遷移宮之隱性影響。
focus.en: Sirius resonates with fixed-star energy analogous to Tianji/Lianzhen; its cycle echoes the 60-year Jiazi stem-branch cycle — a cross-cultural temporal parallel.

focus.zh: 安地斯文明中天狼星（Urcuchillay 神域附近）與喇瑪群星相關，農牧儀式週期結構與多貢 Sigui 呈現相近的 50–60 年大週期思維。
focus.en: In Andean cosmovisión, Sirius-region stars (near Urcuchillay) govern llama-herding rites; the 50–60-year great-cycle thinking parallels the Sigui structural rhythm.

focus.zh: 固定星王權預兆傳統：天狼星光度異常預示乾旱或征戰，與多貢重視週期異象的宇宙觀共鳴。
focus.en: Fixed-star kingship-omen tradition: Sirius magnitude anomalies presaged drought or war — resonating with Dogon emphasis on cyclical cosmic signs.

focus.zh: 長週期曆法（Bak'tun）與儀式時間結構：多貢 60 年 Sigui 與瑪雅長曆的大週期更新理念形成跨洋對話。
focus.en: Long-cycle calendrics (Bak'tun) and ritual time: the 60-year Sigui and Maya Long Count great-cycle renewal share a trans-oceanic dialogue on cosmic periodicity.
